scenario.title: Scenario C - Source Short-Risk Escalation
scenario.subtitle: A high-priority failure mode where safety takes precedence over conceptual scaffolding.
scenario.lab_task: Identify and eliminate unsafe low-resistance paths in a basic power circuit.
scenario.learning_objective: Recognize why unsafe wiring must be handled before measurement reasoning.
scenario.presentation_summary: The system detects an unsafe path across the source, so the teaching flow shifts into immediate containment and correction.
scenario.teacher_note: Use this case to emphasize the difference between conceptual mistakes and safety-sensitive mistakes.

circuit.name: 近似短路风险
circuit.description: 一个闭合开关直接跨接在电源两端，用于触发短路风险诊断。

todo: TODO: 仅支持直流稳态两端器件网络。
TODO: 暂不支持受控源、交流分析、瞬态分析。

diagnostics.title: 短路风险
diagnostics.message: 电源 V1 的两端存在近似零电阻连通路径，存在短路风险。
diagnostics.suggestion: 移除直接跨接电源的低阻路径，确保电流先经过负载。

heuristic_hints: 观察电源两端之间是否存在几乎不经过负载的低阻通路。
direct_fixes: 移除直接跨接电源的导通支路，让电流先经过电阻等负载元件。
teacher_actions: 教师应立即介入，强调短路的安全风险与实验规范。

presentation.scenario_subtitle: A high-priority failure mode where safety takes precedence over conceptual scaffolding.

summary_cards.title: Circuit State
summary_cards.detail: The system detects an unsafe path across the source, so the teaching flow shifts into immediate containment and correction.

summary_cards.title: Intervention
summary_cards.detail: Escalation is forced by repeated unsuccessful attempts in the showcase metadata.

presentation.system_judgement: The wiring creates a near-zero-resistance path across the source and must be treated as unsafe before any instructional discussion continues.
presentation.pedagogical_interpretation: This is not merely a wrong answer; it is a safety-sensitive state. The instructional priority shifts from conceptual coaching to immediate risk containment and supervised correction.
presentation.recommended_next_step: Pause autonomous guidance, bring the instructor into the loop, and use the current state as a supervised correction case.
presentation_script: Zhao Mingrui is currently working on 'Identify and eliminate unsafe low-resistance paths in a basic power circuit.' in scenario 'Scenario C - Source Short-Risk Escalation'.
The system classifies the circuit state as Unsafe Wiring with risk level critical after attempt 2.
Pause autonomous guidance, bring the instructor into the loop, and use the current state as a supervised correction case.
presentation.teacher_note: Use this case to emphasize the difference between conceptual mistakes and safety-sensitive mistakes.
metadata_rows: Identify and eliminate unsafe low-resistance paths in a basic power circuit.
Recognize why unsafe wiring must be handled before measurement reasoning.
heuristic_hints_display: The source terminals are effectively bridged by a very low-resistance path.
direct_fixes_display: Break the shortcut path before restarting the circuit.
teacher_actions_display: Escalate to instructor-led correction after repeated or safety-sensitive errors.
Switch from autonomous coaching to supervised correction immediately.
